arts.sum: Aidan Perkins previews the New Year's Day fixtures in the Championship and has a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney call left wife Coleen 'gutted' before Plymouth Argyle sacking
arts.sum: Coleen Rooney was a surprise late entrant to the ITV reality show I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, and while her husband Wayne was supportive, he was unable to meet her on the bridge when she was evicted due to his then job in football

arts.ttl: EFL preview: Plymouth look to kickstart season after Rooney exit
arts.sum: With Wayne Rooney exiting Plymouth Argyle, BBC Sport takes a look at what New Year's Day has in store in the EFL.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney has Man Utd job target in next 10 years as Plymouth axe falls
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney admitted that he wants to take charge of Manchester United or Everton one day, as news is confirmed of his exit from Plymouth Argyle

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney's managerial record vs Frank Lampard and Steven Gerrard as clear winner emerges
arts.sum: Neither Frank Lampard nor Steven Gerrard have set the world alight since transitioning to management - but they still boast much better statistics than now-unemployed Wayne Rooney

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney leaves Plymouth Argyle after 7 months
arts.sum: In a message to the fans, Rooney added: “I would like to take this opportunity to thank the Board of Plymouth Argyle Football Club, in particular Simon Hallett and Neil Dewsnip who I shared great relationships with. "Departing the club with Rooney will be Assistant Head Coach Mike Phelan and first team coach Simon Ireland."

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney facing further embarrassment as Plymouth sacking hits big-money TV plans
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has been sacked by Plymouth Argyle after a dreadful spell in charge, with the Manchester United icon leaving the Pilgrims sitting rock bottom of the Championship

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney's bold decision left Coleen 'gutted' before Plymouth sacking
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney was hugely supportive of his wife Coleen Rooney when she went on ITV's I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here! but there was one thing he couldn't do

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney fired as Plymouth coach with team last in Championship
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney was fired as Plymouth Argyle coach on Tuesday after just seven months in charge of the struggling Championship team. “Plymouth Argyle can confirm that the club and head coach Wayne Rooney have mutually agreed to part ways with immediate effect,” the club said in a statement .

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney releases statement after being sacked for second time in a year
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has seen his Plymouth tenure ended after just a matter of months with the two parties mutually parting with the Pilgrims currently bottom of the Championship
